metadata.title: Bayan — Arabic Literacy & Reading Fluency Platform
metadata.description: An Arabic-first platform that helps schools, teachers, and students measure and improve reading fluency over time: reading speed, accuracy, vocabulary, and progress tracking.

validation.invalidType: This value isn't the right type.
validation.tooShort: Must be at least {min, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}.
validation.tooLong: Must be at most {max, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

network.title: Connection problem
network.description: Check your internet connection and try again.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to view this.

hero.title: Is the student's Arabic reading ability improving over time?
hero.subtitle: Bayan helps schools, Arabic language centers, and teachers measure and improve reading fluency through reading passages, vocabulary, reading sessions, and precise progress analytics.

speed.title: Reading speed
speed.description: Words per minute for every reading session, with trends tracked over time.

accuracy.title: Reading accuracy
accuracy.description: Accuracy percentage per session to surface and address recurring errors.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary growth
vocabulary.description: Track vocabulary exposure and comprehension alongside every passage.

progress.title: Progress tracking
progress.description: Clear analytics that reveal a struggling reader before they fall behind.

foundation.title: A solid foundation from day one
foundation.subtitle: This phase establishes the platform's technical foundation.

items.rtl: RTL-by-default for Arabic and LTR for English, mirrored correctly throughout.
items.i18n: Fully localized routing, metadata, and messages powered by next-intl.
items.theme: First-class light and dark modes that respect system preference with no flash.
items.a11y: An accessible, keyboard-navigable structure with correct reading order.

validation.gradePositive: Grade must be greater than zero.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to Bayan.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start measuring and improving Arabic reading fluency.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.successDescription: If an account exists for that address, we've sent a link to reset your password.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password you haven't used before.
reset.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one to continue.

invalidCredentials.title: Incorrect email or password
invalidCredentials.description: Check your details and try again.

emailTaken.title: Email already registered
emailTaken.description: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

signUpFailed.title: Couldn't create your account
signUpFailed.description: Something went wrong during registration. Please try again.

resetFailed.title: Couldn't update your password
resetFailed.description: Something went wrong. Please request a new reset link and try again.

weakPassword.title: Password too weak
weakPassword.description: Choose a longer, stronger password and try again.

profileMissing.title: Account setup incomplete
profileMissing.description: Your account isn't fully set up yet. Please contact your administrator.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.emptyDescription: Completed reading sessions will appear here.

insights.title: Needs attention
insights.description: Students with the lowest recent reading performance.
insights.emptyDescription: Once students complete reading sessions, those who need support will show up here.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Platform health and reading activity at a glance.

student.title: Welcome back, {name}
student.subtitle: Grade {grade}
student.unlinkedTitle: Your reading profile isn't set up yet
student.unlinkedDescription: Your teacher hasn't linked a student profile to your account yet. Please ask your teacher or administrator to set it up — your reading progress will appear here once they do.
student.weeklyAria: Completed {completed} of {target} reading sessions this week.

importExport.title: Import students
importExport.description: Upload a CSV or Excel file to add or update students in bulk. You'll review everything before anything is saved.

upload.title: Drag a file here, or choose one
upload.accepted: CSV or XLSX, up to 2,000 rows.
upload.templateHint: Not sure about the format? Download the template:

unreadable.title: Couldn't read this file
unreadable.description: Make sure it's a valid CSV or Excel file, then try again.

empty.title: This file has no rows
empty.description: Add at least one student row and try again.

no_columns.title: No recognized columns
no_columns.description: The header row doesn't match the template. Download the template and try again.

too_many_rows.title: Too many rows
too_many_rows.description: Imports are limited to 2,000 students at a time. Split the file and try again.

preview.summary: {create} to create · {update} to update · {skip} unchanged · {reject} rejected.
preview.noChanges: No changes — already up to date.

empty.reject: No rejected rows — everything checks out.

preview.commit: Import {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}}

reject.duplicateNumberInFile: This student number appears more than once in the file.
reject.duplicateEmailInFile: This email appears more than once in the file.
reject.emailTakenByOther: This email already belongs to another student.

commit.rejectedDescription: Some rows became invalid since the preview. Review them and try again.

result.successDescription: {created, plural, =0 {No students created} one {# student created} other {# students created}}, {updated, plural, =0 {none updated} one {# updated} other {# updated}}.

toasts.successDescription: {created, plural, =0 {No students created} one {# created} other {# created}}, {updated, plural, =0 {none updated} one {# updated} other {# updated}}.

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Manage your students' roster — names, grade, and contact details.

validation.wholeNumber: Enter the grade as a whole number.
validation.positive: Grade must be greater than zero.
validation.dateInFuture: The date can't be in the future.

alreadyLinked.title: Already linked
alreadyLinked.description: Your account is already connected to a student record.

invalidCode.title: Code not recognized
invalidCode.description: That student code is invalid or already linked to another account.

emailInUse.title: Email already in use
emailInUse.description: An account already exists for this student's email address.

claim.title: Link a school record
claim.description: Already enrolled at a school using Bayan? Enter the student code your teacher gave you to connect your account.
claim.successDescription: Your account is now connected. You can start reading.

activation.title: Activation link
activation.description: Provision an account for {name} and share a link to set their password.
activation.intro: Generate a one-time link this student can open to set a password and activate their account. No email is sent — copy the link and share it directly.
activation.hint: The link lets the student set their password. Treat it like a password.

reconcile.title: Reconcile student accounts
reconcile.description: Link existing student logins to matching roster records by email.
reconcile.intro: Preview first: this finds student accounts that aren't linked to a roster record and matches them by email. Apply to create the links.
reconcile.nothingToLink: Nothing to link — matched accounts are already connected, or only conflicts/unmatched remain.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, number, or email

form.createDescription: Create a new roster record. Arabic names are required.

delete.title: Delete student?
delete.description: This will permanently remove {name} from the roster. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No students yet
empty.description: Add your first student to start tracking reading progress.

noResults.title: No students found
noResults.description: No students match your search or filters. Try adjusting them.

error.title: Couldn't load students
error.description: Something went wrong while loading the roster. Please try again.

toasts.createdDescription: The student was added to the roster.

duplicate.title: Couldn't save student
duplicate.description: Please fix the highlighted field and try again.

errors.duplicateNumber: This student number is already in use.
errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already in use.

hasHistory.title: Can't remove this student
hasHistory.description: This student has reading history and can't be removed.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Promote users to teacher and manage teacher accounts.

empty.title: No teachers yet
empty.description: Promote an existing user to teacher to get started.

noResults.title: No teachers found
noResults.description: No teachers match your search or filter.

promote.title: Promote to teacher
promote.description: Choose a user to promote. Only existing accounts can become teachers.
promote.noCandidates: There are no users available to promote right now.

demote.title: Demote to student
demote.description: Demote {name} back to student? Their account, roster record, and reading history are preserved — only the role changes.

notAllowed.title: Role change not allowed
notAllowed.description: This role change can't be performed. Only Student and Teacher roles can be changed.

self.title: Can't change your own role
self.description: You can't change your own role.

error.title: Couldn't load teachers
error.description: Something went wrong while loading this page. Please try again.

validation.positive: Enter a number greater than zero.

passages.title: Passages
passages.subtitle: Create and manage the reading passages students read.

form.createDescription: Add a reading passage. Arabic title and content are required.
form.editDescription: Update this passage's title, content, and details.

delete.title: Delete passage?
delete.description: This will permanently remove “{title}”. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No passages yet
empty.description: Create your first reading passage to start building your library.

noResults.title: No passages found
noResults.description: No passages match your search or filters. Try adjusting them.

error.title: Couldn't load passages
error.description: Something went wrong while loading the passages. Please try again.

toasts.createdDescription: The passage was added to your library.

inUse.title: Can't remove this passage
inUse.description: This passage is in use by reading sessions or vocabulary and can't be removed.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.subtitle: Manage the vocabulary terms attached to your reading passages.

form.createDescription: Add a term and attach it to a passage. Arabic word and meaning are required.
form.editDescription: Update this term's word, meaning, and passage.

delete.title: Delete term?
delete.description: This will permanently remove “{word}”. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No vocabulary yet
empty.description: Add your first term to start building vocabulary for your passages.

noPassages.title: Create a passage first
noPassages.description: Vocabulary terms attach to a reading passage. Create a passage before adding vocabulary.

noResults.title: No vocabulary found
noResults.description: No terms match your search or filters. Try adjusting them.

error.title: Couldn't load vocabulary
error.description: Something went wrong while loading the vocabulary. Please try again.

missingPassage.title: Couldn't save term
missingPassage.description: The selected passage no longer exists. Refresh and choose another passage.

readingSessions.title: My reading
readingSessions.subtitle: Start a reading session and track how your fluency improves over time.

unlinked.title: Your reading profile isn't set up yet
unlinked.description: Ask your teacher to add you to a class so you can start reading sessions.

noPassages.title: No passages available yet
noPassages.description: Your teacher hasn't added any reading passages. Check back soon.

start.title: Start a reading session
start.description: Pick a passage, read it aloud at your own pace, then record how you did.

runner.inProgress: Reading in progress. Select ‘I'm done’ when you finish.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.hint: Tap a word to see what it means.
vocabulary.drawerDescription: Tap a word to see what it means.

empty.title: No vocabulary for this passage
empty.description: This passage doesn't have any vocabulary terms to look up.

error.title: Couldn't load vocabulary
error.description: Something went wrong loading the words for this passage.

review.title: How did it go?
review.subtitle: Enter how many words you misread, then save your session.
review.errorsHint: Out of {count} words in this passage.

empty.title: No reading sessions yet
empty.description: Your completed sessions and progress will appear here.

history.trendDescription: Words per minute across your recent sessions.

error.title: Couldn't load your reading
error.description: Something went wrong while loading this page. Please try again.

validation.positive: Time must be greater than zero.
validation.durationTooLong: A session can't be longer than {max} seconds.

notLinked.title: Reading profile not set up
notLinked.description: Ask your teacher to add you to a class before recording a session.

passageMissing.title: Passage not found
passageMissing.description: This passage is no longer available. Pick another and try again.

errorsExceedWords.title: Too many misread words
errorsExceedWords.description: You can't misread more than the {words} words in this passage.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your appearance, language, and notification preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and photo. Your email and role are managed for you.

avatar.label: Photo
avatar.hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Up to 1 MB.

invalidImage.title: Unsupported image
invalidImage.description: Choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.

imageTooLarge.title: Image too large
imageTooLarge.description: Choose an image up to 1 MB.

decodeFailed.title: Couldn't process image
decodeFailed.description: That image couldn't be read. Try another file.

invalidImage.title: Unsupported image
invalidImage.description: Choose a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.

imageTooLarge.title: Image too large
imageTooLarge.description: Choose an image up to 1 MB.

uploadFailed.title: Upload failed
uploadFailed.description: Your photo couldn't be uploaded. Please try again.

saveFailed.title: Couldn't save photo
saveFailed.description: Your photo couldn't be saved. Please try again.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Bayan looks. ‘System’ follows your device setting.

language.title: Language
language.description: Set the language and reading direction for the interface.

reducedMotion.title: Reduced motion
reducedMotion.description: Minimize animations and transitions across the app.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Receive product and progress updates by email when available.

error.title: Couldn't load your settings
error.description: Something went wrong while loading this page. Please try again.

footer.builtFor: Built for schools, Arabic language centers, and reading teachers.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

analytics.title: Reading Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track how Arabic reading is improving over time.

error.title: Couldn't load analytics
error.description: Something went wrong loading the analytics. Please try again.

charts.wpmDescription: Average words per minute over time.

needsAttention.title: Needs attention
needsAttention.description: Readers with the lowest accuracy and speed.
needsAttention.emptyDescription: No students need attention in this range.

students.title: Students
students.description: Open a student to see their reading trends.
students.searchResults: {count, plural, =0 {No matching students} one {# matching student} other {# matching students}}
students.emptyDescription: No students have reading data in this range.

empty.allDescription: Analytics will appear once students complete reading sessions.
empty.rangeDescription: Try a wider time range to see reading trends.

studentEmpty.allDescription: This student hasn't completed any reading sessions yet.

insights.title: Insights
insights.empty: Not enough data for insights yet.

kinds.wpm_improving: Reading speed rose by {delta} wpm over recent sessions.
kinds.wpm_declining: Reading speed fell by {delta} wpm over recent sessions.
kinds.accuracy_improving: Accuracy improved by {delta} points over recent sessions.
kinds.accuracy_declining: Accuracy dropped by {delta} points over recent sessions.
kinds.accuracy_low: Average accuracy is low at {accuracy}% — extra practice may help.
kinds.needs_more_data: Only {sessions} sessions so far — more reading will sharpen these insights.

error.title: Couldn't load the report
error.description: Something went wrong building the report. Please try again.

empty.allTitle: Not enough data to generate a report
empty.allDescription: This report will be available once students complete reading sessions.
empty.rangeDescription: Choose a wider time range to generate this report.

studentEmpty.allTitle: Not enough data to generate a report
studentEmpty.allDescription: This student hasn't completed any reading sessions yet.

roster.title: Student summary
roster.description: Reading speed, accuracy, and activity per student for this range.
roster.name: Student
